title: ORTHODONTIC SERVICES - 211info
text: OHSU DENTAL CLINIC ORTHODONTIC SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides both limited and comprehensive orthodontic treatment. 2730 SW Moody Avenue Skourtes Tower Portland, OR 972015042 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:45pm Email (503) 494-8921 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 494-8921 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by procedure; no free care. Accepts most dental insurance plans. Payment is due at the time of service. Care Credit and Lending Tree payment plans are available. 12.5% discount for individuals without dental insurance. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Patient entrance is on the bottom floor at the corner of Southwest Moody Avenue and Southwest Meade Street. Located on the MAX Orange Line and the Portland Streetcar line. Services: Orthodontics Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALTY MEDICINE - OHSU DENTAL CLINICS SPECIALTY MEDICINE - PEDIATRIC DENTISTRY SPECIALTY MEDICINE - SPECIAL NEEDS DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OHSU DENTAL CLINIC
